description: Finance club fostering campus financial literacy.

description: SSCBS Global Best Strategy Project Award winner.

description: Business Net; Started with 10 members; vision to reach 500 by 2026. Tel: 8506996650.

description: Angel Group; Supporting high-potential tech startups with funding.

name: Startup Grind
description: Global Comm; Founders and investors; regular networking events.

name: HEN India
description: Women Net.; Her Entrepreneurial Network; weekly learning sessions.

name: BioX Club
description: Blends biology with technology; focuses on synthetic biology, bioinformatics, and low-cost diagnostics. Developed open-source hardware for biological experiments; hosts "Bio-Hackathons".

name: Bio-Engineering Association
description: Department-specific body promoting advanced research in cellular and tissue engineering. Organized international seminars on neural engineering and regenerative medicine.

name: Microzone Association
description: Focuses on microbiology and genetic research through student-led symposiums. Conducted "Microcampus Odyssey" and workshops on gene editing in food revolutions.

name: Department of Biotechnology
description: Technical student body overseeing specialized research in fermentation and polymer science. Facilitated research collaborations with NCL-IISER for biotechnology students.

name: Home Science Association
description: Interdisciplinary body focusing on nutrition, bio-science, and family resource management. Collaborated with Toastmasters for leadership workshops in health sciences.

name: Indian Society of Chemists and Biologists
description: Promotes interdisciplinary cooperation in medicinal and biomolecular chemistry. Signed MoU with EFMC; features top 2% global scientists (e.g., Dr. PMS Chauhan).

name: Society for Materials Chemistry
description: Focuses on biocompatible materials for medical implants and drug delivery. Conducts national workshops on SPC-MAT focusing on bio-structure correlations.

name: Nehru Planetarium
description: While astronomy-focused, it hosts regular biological science lectures on astrobiology and the origin of life. Conducts "Science Day" exhibitions featuring regional biological research models.

name: Quant Club
description: Focuses on quantitative finance, probability, and algorithmic trading strategies. Conducts workshops on derivatives pricing and financial modeling.

name: Maths and Physics Club
description: Celebrates basic sciences through symposiums, lectures, and research funding. Successfully pass the "torch" annually via structured convener selections; funds experimental setups.

name: Mathletics
description: Encourages interest in mathematics through puzzles, logic competitions, and "Hypatia" (Math Day). Organized the "Fibonacci Feast" and "TechSigma" for inter-college participation.

name: Artha
description: While economic, it focuses heavily on quantitative analysis and statistical modeling. Conducts workshops on data analysis using statistical software for B.Sc. students.

name: Academic Discussion Forum
description: A peer-led forum for discussing complex mathematical theorems and problem-solving. Acts as a support network for postgraduate students tackling high-level calculus.

name: The Mathematics Consortium
description: A consortium of mathematical societies in India and SAARC for research collaboration. Organized joint conferences with the American Mathematical Society (AMS).

name: Indian Mathematical Society
description: The oldest scientific society in India for promoting mathematical study. Publishes "The Mathematics Student"; maintains life and student membership tiers.

name: Ramanujan Mathematical Society
description: Promotes mathematical education and the legacy of Srinivasa Ramanujan. Conducts annual training programs for Ph.D. scholars in advanced algebra.

name: Indian Statistical Association
description: Professional body for statisticians focusing on probability and research methodology. Hosts workshops on Big Data and statistical inference in Mumbai.

name: Maths and Physics Club
description: Aim to reignite inquisitiveness for basic sciences through lectures and lab visits. Organized visits to campus labs and off-campus research facilities for experimental work.

name: Physics Association
description: Organizes "fun activities with physics" to encourage undergraduate interest. Conducts "Electro-Hunt" and science fests focusing on electronics-themed crosswords.

name: Engineering Physics Society
description: Departmental body focusing on the application of physics in modern engineering. Hosts symposiums on photonics, semiconductor devices, and quantum optics.

name: AR VR Club
description: Explores the physics of light, optics, and perception through augmented and virtual reality. Developed educational modules using immersive technology for engineering courses.

name: Academic Mentorship Club
description: Provides academic support for students in difficult physics and engineering courses. Acts as a peer-to-peer tutoring network for first-year engineering students.

name: Society for Materials Chemistry
description: Professional body promoting research in materials chemistry and physics. Hosted the 7th National Workshop on Materials Chemistry (NWMC-2025).

name: Indian Academy of Mathematics
description: Promotes theoretical research at the intersection of math and theoretical physics. Organizes specialized seminars for researchers in applied mathematics and physics.

name: Nehru Centre
description: Conducts high-level lectures by renowned scientists like Dr. Jayant Narlikar on physics. Acts as the primary public outreach center for theoretical physics in Mumbai.

name: Chemistry Club
description: Unites students with a love for chemistry through experimental and academic exploration. Collaborates with the Tinkerers' Lab for hands-on chemical engineering projects.

name: Technological Association
description: The overarching student body overseeing 29 representatives for technical and cultural fests. Organizes "Vortex," the inter-collegiate technical festival drawing participants nationwide.

name: Chemical Engineering Association
description: Department-specific body promoting process engineering and industrial chemistry. Conducts "AZeotropy," India’s largest chemical engineering symposium.

name: Chemistry Association
description: Organizes "Culinary Chemix" and "Academicia" to promote chemistry through flavor and food. Conducts Trick or Taste events and Heist to Harvest workshops on Science Day.

name: Bombay Technologists
description: Runs the in-house technical journal focusing on scientific writing and chemical research. Encourages students to publish peer-reviewed articles on industrial chemistry.

name: Society for Materials Chemistry
description: Professional body promoting materials chemistry among scientists and engineers. Over 2,300 life members; organizes biennial international symposia (ISMC).

name: Indian Society of Chemists and Biologists
description: Focuses on interdisciplinary coop and promoting awareness of recent developments in science. MoUs with EFMC; publishes high-impact journals in medicinal chemistry.

name: Udct Alumni Association
description: Networking platform for former chemical technology students of ICT Mumbai. Provides infrastructure support and industry linkages for current students.

name: IIT Bombay Racing
description: Student-led team designing and fabricating high-performance formula electric race cars. Multiple national and international Formula Student awards; innovators in EV powertrains.

name: VJTI Racing
description: Focuses on All-Terrain Vehicles (ATVs) and engines for BAJA SAE competitions. Consistent top finishers in BAJA SAE India; experts in suspension and chassis design.

name: SAE Racing Club
description: Collegiate chapter of the Society of Automotive Engineers promoting racing excellence. Organizes workshops on automotive engines and corporate networking.

name: Hyperloop IITB
description: Redefining speed by developing high-speed pod transportation systems. Represented India at international SpaceX Hyperloop Pod competitions.

name: Team Shunya
description: Focuses on net-zero energy building, though utilizes automotive thermal management principles. Multiple international awards in the Solar Decathlon China and India.

name: Royal Western India Turf Club
description: While primarily horse racing, it is a historical hub for the city’s elite sporting culture. Hosts the Indian Derby and provides world-class racing infrastructure in Mahalaxmi.

name: Enfield Riders Club
description: A community for Royal Enfield enthusiasts focusing on long-distance touring and mechanical DIY. Organizes cross-country tours and basic engine maintenance workshops for members.

name: Palm Beach Riders
description: Navi Mumbai-based motorcycling group focused on safety and community riding events. Conducts "Ride for Safety" campaigns along the Palm Beach Road corridor.

name: Montage
description: The official cultural club; focuses on interconnecting dance, drama, and fashion. Organized "Cultural Days" and "Talent Hunt" with participation from across the school.

name: Culturals@IITB
description: Umbrella body for performing arts; hosts diverse genres including Classical and Folk. Manages the "Dance GC" and coordinates massive teams for inter-IIT meets.

name: Pratibimb Dance Wing
description: VJTI's national cultural festival wing that showcases versatility in street and classical dance. Organized high-energy contests that draw thousands of participants annually.

name: Ami-Cult
description: Performing arts club focusing on hones professional and leadership skills through dance. Conducts hands-on activities that improve communication through rhythmic expression.

name: Performing Arts Club
description: Focuses on the academic and artistic integration of performing arts into student life. Managed by faculty to ensure a high standard of creative production and wellness.

name: NCPA
organization: National Centre for the Performing Arts
description: India's premier cultural institution for preserving and promoting classical dance. Hosts 700+ events annually; features international contemporary and folk troupes.

name: AcroYoga Mumbai
description: Focuses on the solar and lunar parts of acrobatics—basing, flying, and core training. Integrates games and communication skills with high-intensity partner exercises.

name: Zumba Workshop
description: Provides high-energy fitness and dance training for local residents and students. Conducted as part of the "Bollywood Flashback" and health-wellness initiatives.

name: Country Club
description: Offers daily dance and fitness classes including Bollywood and Aerobics. Popular among South Mumbai residents for community-based fitness engagement.

name: Indian Music Group
description: Promotes Indian Classical Music through concerts and appreciation courses. Organizes "Jan-Fest," one of Mumbai's most highly rated annual music festivals.

name: Treblemakers
description: Interest-based music cell for management students; focuses on contemporary genres. Managed large-scale performances for "RangPunch" and intra-college fests.

name: Music Club of ICT
description: Focuses on vocal and instrumental music development for chemical tech students. Core performer for the "ManZar" and "FunTech" annual cultural events.

name: Music Association
description: Organizes "Open Mic" events and "Nostalgia Knockout" to foster musical bonding. Managed the "Electro Quiz" and "Febonacci Feast" entertainment segments.

name: Roots
description: Dedicated to Indian classical and folk music within the IITB cultural ecosystem. Organized workshops with maestros and maintained a high standard in inter-IIT music.

name: Sofar Sounds Mumbai
description: Community of music-lovers hosting secret gigs in unique city locations. Intimate gatherings in living rooms and terraces where listening is prioritized.

name: Music Jammin
description: Platform for budding artists and local talent to showcase and collaborate. Meets twice a month for sessions aimed at safe and supportive evolution of talent.

name: My Music Gym
description: A head-office hub for vocational music training and community jamming. Rated for its collaborative atmosphere and professional voice training courses.

name: The Bandra Base
description: A community space and cultural club dedicated to intimate musical performances. Acts as a boutique venue for jazz, indie, and alternative music in West Mumbai.

name: Fourthwall
description: The official dramatics club focusing on street plays and stage performances. Consistently wins national street-play competitions; organizes the annual Dramatics GC.

name: Rangawardhan
description: Dedicated to Marathi culture through drama, adaptations, and literature. Celebrated its 25th anniversary in 2024 with a mascot and logo unveiling by state ministers.

name: Ami-Theatre
description: Theatre club focusing on professional skills and harnessing student potential. Organizes meaningful cultural activities based on hands-on production experiences.

name: Nepathya
description: Interest-based cell for stage performances and theatrical management. Managed major productions for "RangPunch" and internal management festivals.

name: Montage Drama Wing
description: Focuses on interconnecting art forms through stagecraft and performance. Successfully hosted intra-college fests like "Euphoria" and "Parichay".

name: Naatakwaale Theatre Company
description: Professional group performing stage, street, and corporate plays. Performed 1200+ street plays on social issues; conducted 300+ workshops.

name: Prithvi Theatre
description: Hosting open-mic sessions for written and performed theatrical work. The fourth Monday of every month features budding stand-up and dramatic talent.

name: Manch & More
description: Cultural and theatrical club focusing on regional and modern drama in Malad. Provides a platform for unlearning experiences and experimental stagecraft.

name: New Acropolis
description: Uses theatre to explore philosophical themes like the "Way of the Samurai". Conducts "Living Philosophy" courses integrated with performed narratives.

name: Krittika
description: The official astronomy club; aims to reignite curiosity for the cosmos. Conducts stargazing sessions and theoretical lectures on planetary science.

name: Vishwa
description: Space science club aiming to launch VJTI’s first student satellite. Participates in international competitions like IRC, URC, and CanSat.

name: Ami-Astro
description: Focuses on the study of space sciences and observational astronomy. Organizes campus-wide events for eclipses and planetary transits.

name: Aero VJTI
description: Specialized wing focusing on aerospace engineering and high-altitude ballooning. Managed by faculty to provide technical skill development in aerospace.

name: Pratham Team
description: Focused exclusively on satellite design and launch logistics. Successfully managed the documentation and hardware for student satellite missions.

name: Khagol Mandal
description: Registered voluntary organization (est. 1985) focusing on public sky sessions. Hosted first International Pro-Am Meeting in Mumbai; 39 years of sky sessions.

name: Akashmitra Mandal
description: Amateur astronomers organization focusing on systematic study and research. Discovered first SOHO comet in India; conducts Basic Astronomy courses.

name: i-RoboChakra
description: ISRO Registered Official Space Tutor Program for young innovators. Journey through space technology and understanding real-world ISRO projects.

name: The Himalayan Club
description: While mountaineering-focused, maintains a world-class library of maps and stars. Provides resources for high-altitude astronomical research and expedition logistics.

name: Web and Coding Club
description: The official programming club promoting everything from web-dev to competitive coding. Runs "Seasons of Code," a collaborative summer program for open-source growth.

name: Community of Coders
description: Focuses on data structures, algorithms, and collaborative development. Consistent top finishers in national hackathons; manages institutional software repos.

name: DevCom
description: Dedicated development community within IITB focusing on institutional portals. Maintained and upgraded critical student-management and certificate portals.

name: GDSC VJTI
description: Google Developer Student Club focusing on Google cloud and mobile tech. Organized workshops on Flutter, AI, and cloud computing for engineering students.

name: Cybersecurity Community
description: Focused on network security, ethical hacking, and data protection. Conducts "Capture the Flag" events to test vulnerability assessment skills.

name: Mumbai Coding Club
description: Professional training hub focusing on full-stack development and Python. Reports 100% Avg Salary Hike for participants; captured 2.5 Cr+ market value.

name: SP Robotics Maker Lab
description: National chain focusing on coding, drones, and IOT for young creators. India’s No. 1 Coding & Robotics Learning Centre with 75+ branches.

name: La Electronics Lab
description: Master Arduino, ESP32, and Raspberry Pi through structured courses. Provided invaluable assistance for final-year projects on accident detection.

name: i-RoboChakra
description: Teaches machine learning and AI concepts to young innovators in Navi Mumbai. Prepares children for careers in the fastest-growing tech fields.

name: Adventure Sports
description: Focuses on trekking, rock climbing, paragliding, and mountaineering courses. Organized various expeditions in the Sahyadri ranges and high-altitude courses.

name: Hobby Club
description: Promotes networking and personality development through trekking and stargazing. Conducted workshops and guided trekking sessions in the hills and forts of Mumbai.

name: Cycling Club
description: Promotes sustainable travel and high-intensity fitness through long-distance rides. Conducts intra-campus and inter-city cycling tours regularly.

name: Skating Club
description: Focuses on rhythmic movement and high-speed balance through skating events. Managed by the Adventure and General Sports council for student wellness.

name: Girivihar
description: Founded in 1954; premier mountaineering club in India focusing on high altitudes. Organized 50+ Himalayan expeditions; successfully climbed peaks beyond 8000m.

name: The Himalayan Club
description: Established in 1928; one of the oldest clubs for travel and exploration in the Himalayas. Publishes the authentic "Himalayan Journal"; maintains massive libraries in Mumbai.

name: Chakram Hikers
description: NGO focusing on non-profit adventure sports and forest conservation. Recognized for true efforts in leadership development and rural outreach.

name: Gorilla Adventures
description: Outdoor sports store and tour operator specializing in hiking and climbing. Offers adventure tours in rappelling, valley crossing, and rock climbing.

name: Let's Get Lost
description: Travel community organizing overnight camps and offbeat weekend getaways. Hosted unique events like watching movies under the stars at Rajmachi Fort.

name: Montage Fashion Committee
description: Part of ASMSOC's cultural club; focuses on runway events and professional styling. Organizes "Vaayu Fashion Week," a highlight of the international-level college fest.

name: Ami-Trendz
description: Style club aimed at honing professional and leadership skills through fashion. Conducts hands-on activities to improve intellectual and communication skills through style.

name: FAD Department
description: Departmental association focusing on fashion and interior design. Organized visits to specialized departments for AICTE lab exposure in fashion.

name: Lifestyle Genre
description: Umbrella body for style, design, and classical arts within the cultural council. Manages "Lifestyle GC" focusing on personal branding and stage presence.

name: Montage Admin/Finance
description: While organizational, it handles the massive budget and logistics for fashion shows. Successfully managed the sponsorship for "Talent Hunt" and "Vaayu" events.

name: FTP Institute
description: Provides weekend courses in basic and advanced digital fashion photography. Led by celebrity fashion photographers like Viraj sir for detailed mentorship.

name: Kids Fun Club - Creativities
description: Head of Creativities focusing on new business and creative play for kids in Malabar Hill. Promotes "Ridge Road" events for high-end creative and lifestyle training.

name: Ami-Psyche
description: Focuses on holistic development and emotional well-being as part of university lifestyle. Integrates style with emotional intelligence for well-rounded student growth.

name: Silverscreen
description: The official film and media club focusing on cinematography and storytelling. Produced high-quality short films for inter-college and internal festivals.

name: Snap-Squad
description: Dedicated photography club aiming to harness student potential through visual media. Members take part in several exhibitions and photo-walks both on and off campus.

name: Ami-Cine
description: Movie production club focusing on the technical aspects of filmmaking. Organizes Meaningful cultural activities through the lens of production.

name: Photography Head
description: Part of the Technological Association managing the institute's visual documentation. Manages photography for "Vortex" and inter-college cultural festivals.

name: Media & Creative Production
description: Focused on institutional branding and digital media production for student events. Managed by faculty to ensure high-quality visual outputs for Technovanza.

name: Photographic Society of India
description: Established in 1937; focuses on promotion and advancement of photographic art. Hosts Members' Annual Exhibition 2026; publishes the "Click Magazine".

name: National Institute of Photography
description: Offers professional courses in wedding, fashion, and lifestyle photography. Renowned for commitment to excellence and expert instructors in Mumbai.

name: Mumbai Weekend Shoot
description: Independent photography group organizing weekly heritage and street walks. Active community on Flickr and Facebook for amateur street photography.

name: The Raw Lab
description: Specialized photography group focusing on high-quality post-production and editing. Rated for its eye for detail and creative approach to visual storytelling.

name: Mumbai Photography Workshops
description: Custom-tailored workshops in street photography (Sassoon Docks, Chor Bazaar). Led by experts like Craig Boehman focusing on ICM and station photography.

name: Abhyuday
description: The social body of IITB focusing on sensitization and hands-on welfare projects. Organized Mumbai's largest blood donation drives and rural activity camps.

name: Social Service League
description: Operating for over 50 years focusing on altruism and rural work. Conducts "Project Care" for economically challenged or differently-abled children.

name: Social Responsibility Forum
description: Conduit for social welfare through exhilarating events and taboo awareness. Successfully organized "WEvolve" and distribution drives in local slums.

name: Enactus
description: Focuses on entrepreneurial action and social innovation through revenue-generating projects. Managed "Project Neev" and "Project Aaranya" to empower local beneficiaries.

name: Social & Community Activities
description: Faculty-led body overseeing community-focused cultural activities. Conducts "National Unity Day" and collaboration with Matunga Police for harmony.

name: Robin Hood Army
description: Volunteer-based organization redistributing surplus food from restaurants. Served 118 million+ people; operates the "Robin Hood Academy" for street children.

name: iVolunteer
description: Social enterprise connecting volunteers with high-impact NGO opportunities in Mumbai. Facilitates skills-based volunteering for over 500 active NGOs in the city.

name: Girija Welfare Association
description: Community-based NGO focusing on health and social development in Mumbai Central. Rated 4.3 stars for its long-term social impact and disciplinary welfare committees.

name: Rotary Club of Bombay Bandra
description: Professional network focusing on large-scale community and rural development. Part of a global network for polio eradication and local education initiatives.

name: DLA Society
description: The only non-technical society in VJTI focusing on quizzes, debates, and MUNs. Organizes regular seminars on economics and creative writing.

name: Debating Society
description: Focuses on critical thinking and clear, convincing arguments for corporate readiness. Organized workshops on "Problem Solving" and "Analytical Thinking".

name: SAMSOE Debating Division
description: Undergraduate division of the School of Economics focusing on Oxford-style debates. Hosts "Shastrarth," the flagship annual debate festival drawing 1000+ participants.

name: Speaking Genre
description: Part of the Culturals council focusing on formal debates and spoken word. Manages the "Speaking GC" and trains teams for international debating forums.

name: NMIMS Mumbai Toastmasters
description: A specialized collegiate chapter of Toastmasters for management students. Focuses on integrating the Toastmasters curriculum into the MBA experience.

name: Mumbai Toastmasters
description: Open community club meeting at R D National College, Bandra West. One of the oldest Toastmasters clubs in the city (est. 2007).

name: The Talking Club
description: A massive meetup-based group focusing on unlearning and discussion. 1,711 members dedicated to free-form debate and conversational skill development.

name: Mulund Toastmasters
description: Community club for Northeast Mumbai focusing on leadership and public speaking. Rated for its consistent weekend meetings and high-quality speech evaluations.

name: South Mumbai Toastmasters
description: Elite community club focusing on advanced rhetorical skills and leadership. Meets twice a month to foster professional-grade communication skills.

name: Expedition Toastmasters Mumbai
description: Specialized club with professional and educational prerequisites for membership. Focuses on high-level executive communication and strategic leadership.

name: Fine Arts Society
category: Fine Arts, Painting, and Creative Design
description: An independent society aiming to nurture the artist within engineering students. Responsible for institutional murals and maintaining the scenic beauty of VJTI.

name: PFA
category: Fine Arts, Painting, and Creative Design
description: Dual-focus club promoting sketching, painting, and clay modeling. Organizes the "Fine Arts GC" and massive on-campus art exhibitions.

name: Montage Fine Arts Wing
category: Fine Arts, Painting, and Creative Design
description: ASMSOC's cultural wing focusing on aesthetic stage design and painting. Successfully integrated fine arts into the "Talent Hunt" and "Vaayu" festivals.

name: Art Club of ICT
category: Fine Arts, Painting, and Creative Design
description: Comprises Fine Arts and Performing Arts wings for chemical tech students. Manages the "ManZar" art gallery and regional literature fests.

name: Fine Arts & Creative Club
category: Fine Arts, Painting, and Creative Design
description: Faculty-led body focusing on academic integration of fine arts. Managed by Prof. Kavita Fasate for a high standard of creative production.

name: Bombay Art Society
category: Fine Arts, Painting, and Creative Design
description: Established in 1888; non-profit institution promoting art in the city. Houses three exhibition galleries, an auditorium, and an art library in Bandra.

name: Art Society of India
category: Fine Arts, Painting, and Creative Design
description: Established in 1918; landmark institution for visual arts independence. Organizing the 108th All India Annual Art Exhibition in 2026.

name: The Fine Arts Society
category: Fine Arts, Painting, and Creative Design
description: Suburban temple of arts promoting classical culture and aesthetic education. Landmark prestigious cultural organization since the Republic Day of 1962.

name: Hobby Club
category: Fine Arts, Painting, and Creative Design
description: Vidyalankar Institute’s wing for public art exhibitions and cartoon workshops. Conducted painting workshops led by student artists like Amol Koli.

name: Umbrella Painting Workshop
category: Fine Arts, Painting, and Creative Design
description: Seasonal community group focused on functional and decorative art. Promotes accessible community art through workshops in suburban Mumbai.

name: DLA Society
description: Manages institutional newsletters (VJ News) and literary seminars. Only non-technical society; organizes quizzes, debates, and creative writing fests.

name: Literary Arts
description: Dedicated to prose, poetry, and journalistic writing within the cultural council. Hosts "Litrati," a national literary festival for students across India.

name: Literary Association
description: Organizes "Art Thou Among Us" and "Conversations with Authors" events. Managed the "Academicia" and "Nostalgia Knockout" literary segments.

name: Literary Club
description: Manages English and regional literature events for technical students. Core component of the "ManZar" cultural and literary festival.

name: Manthan
description: Regional literary and cultural club focusing on Marathi and vernacular arts. Promotes deep cultural roots through poetry and traditional literary fests.

name: Broke Bibliophiles
description: Mumbai chapter aiming to build a massive community of bibliophiles. Organizes theme-based meetings (e.g., Harry Potter month) in restaurants.

name: Juhu Book Club
description: Founded in 2006 to review books and talk "endlessly" about them. Extremely active social media presence; known for monthly shortlisted reviews.

name: Bring Your Own Book
description: Pan-India network chapter allowing members to borrow/lend books for free. Maintains an online library; meets in cafes and parks across Mumbai.

name: Mumbai Bookworms
description: GoodReads group for "buddy reads," reviews, and banter on myriad topics. 796 members; focuses on engaging book-lovers in everything dealing with books.

name: Bound Together Bombay
description: Free and independent book club meeting at bars/cafes for deep analysis. Explores diverse themes from contemporary French to sports fiction.

name: Comedy Cons
description: Official humor club aiming to promote stand-up and improvisation. Organizes the "Humour GC" and open-mic nights across campus hostels.

name: Montage Talent Wing
description: NMIMS branch focusing on identifying and nurturing comedic talent. Successfully hosted "Open Mic 2021" and "Open Mic 2022" for performers.

name: Talent Hunt
description: Organizes university-level competitions to discover new comedic voices. Feeder program for major college festivals like "Vaayu" and "Euphoria".

name: FunTech Performers
description: ICT branch dedicated to intra-college comedic and variety performances. Focuses on providing a stage for chemistry students to delight and awe.

name: The Habitat
description: Vibrant community space hosting open-mic nights and live entertainment. Features the "Guftugu" interaction show; highly rated for clean, creative humor.

name: That Comedy Club
description: Popular venue in Bandra conducting shows Tuesday through Sunday. Witnessed live performances by India's finest comedians like Masoom Rajwani.

name: The Integral Space
description: South Mumbai hub for "Women Slay Wednesdays" and open-mic comedy. Focuses on relatable themes like adulting and sibling rivalry for laughter.

name: Standup Labs
description: Mini comedy club run by comics experimenting with trial and solo shows. Organizes daily shows to keep up with the vibrant local comedy scene.

name: Cuckoo Club
description: Intimate venue hosting outstation comedians and fresh faces on Thursdays. Known for its attractive setting and proximity between performers and audience.

name: Electronics and Robotics Club
description: Cater to the institute's electronics community through tinkering and innovation. Conducts "XLR8," a flagship robotics competition for technical students.

name: Tinkerers' Laboratory
description: Hub for practical solutions; bridges theory with hands-on learning. Features 250+ workstations for laser cutting, 3D printing, and testing.

name: EESA
description: Promotes research sharing through "EE Students' Reading Group". Organized symposiums on microelectronics and power systems.

name: Ham Radio Club
description: Amateur radio club focusing on electronics and communication technology. Maintains an active base station for global amateur communication.

name: Electronics Association
description: Organizes "Electro-Hunt" and "Electro Quiz" to encourage technical curiosity. Managed "Sapienza" (Science Day) events focusing on electronic crosswords.

name: La Electronics Lab
description: Premier lab Master Arduino, ESP32, and Raspberry Pi for kids and engineers. Provided critical assistance for final year projects on real-time detection.

name: SP Robotics Maker Lab
description: India's largest chain of Maker Spaces for advanced IoT and VR learning. India's first STEM Accredited Maker Lab; trusted by national tech awards.

name: Makerspace
description: Creative space for hands-on STEM and arts-integrated projects. Successfully built robots and IoT sensors using Arduino and Raspberry Pi.

name: NatureNurture Innovation Lab
description: Reimagining education with hands-on prototypes and DIY tools. Partners with schools to set up customized makerspaces for future innovators.

name: AUV-IITB
description: Underwater robotics team developing autonomous exploration vehicles. Successfully competed in international AUVSI competitions with custom subs.

name: SRA
description: Hub for innovation, AI, and embedded systems through exciting projects. Consistent top finisher in national robotics hackathons and competitions.

name: Mars Rover Team
description: Designs and fabricates rovers for simulated Martian terrain exploration. Regularly participates in the international University Rover Challenge (URC).

name: RAC
description: Hands-on sensor interfacing and autonomous system assembly workshops. Developed IoT cloud apps for agriculture and line-following robots.

name: AI Community
description: Collaborative community for everything related to Artificial Intelligence. Conducts neural network workshops and AI-driven predictive modeling fests.

name: i-RoboChakra
description: Complete STEAM education focusing on robotics, AI, and space technology. Trusted by 2000+ parents and 26+ institutions; STEM certified curriculum.

name: CreativeLinks Club
description: Empowering children with problem-solving using Lego Robotics tools. Prepared children to thrive in the age of AI through structured building kits.

name: Makerspace
description: Innovation lab where learning becomes interactive, practical, and fun. Partners with learning centers and NGOs for STEM skills-building.

name: SP Robotics Maker Lab
description: Edu-tainment center to build robots, drones, and android apps in Mumbai. India's No. 1 robotics chain with kits and kits-based learning tracks.

name: Technological Association
category: Cultural Umbrella Bodies and Regional Sanghams
description: Umbrella student body (est. 1934) managing all technical and cultural fests. Organizes "ManZar" and "FunTech" festivals with 29 student representatives.

name: Culturals@IITB
category: Cultural Umbrella Bodies and Regional Sanghams
description: The primary body responsible for dance, music, literary arts, and lifestyle. Manages the massive Mood Indigo festival and inter-IIT cultural contingents.

name: Pratibimb Council
category: Cultural Umbrella Bodies and Regional Sanghams
description: National cultural festival reflecting energy, enthusiasm, and camaraderie. Organized three-day extravaganzas focusing on versatility and managerial skills.

name: Montage
category: Cultural Umbrella Bodies and Regional Sanghams
description: Cultural club believing in interconnecting art forms for a taste of all crafts. Successfully hosted "Talent Hunt" and "Cultural Days" for years.

name: Ami-Cult
category: Cultural Umbrella Bodies and Regional Sanghams
description: Performing arts body aiming to harness potential through cultural events. Organizes meaningful activities to improve intellectual and professional skills.

name: Mumbai Tamil Sangham
category: Cultural Umbrella Bodies and Regional Sanghams
description: Promotes Tamil language, literature, and cultural heritage in Mumbai. Landmark organization for the Tamil community; hosts annual regional festivals.

name: Telugu Sahitya Samiti
category: Cultural Umbrella Bodies and Regional Sanghams
description: Dedicated to Telugu literature and regional cultural preservation. Acts as a community hub for the Telugu-speaking population in Chembur East.

name: Navi Mumbai Bihar Association
category: Cultural Umbrella Bodies and Regional Sanghams
description: Promotes the welfare and heritage of the Bihari diaspora in Navi Mumbai. Organizes Chhath Puja and regional networking events annually.

name: New Acropolis Cultural Org
category: Cultural Umbrella Bodies and Regional Sanghams
description: International school of philosophy hosting "Living Philosophy" talks and art. Aiming to help individuals become more complete through cultural unlearning.

name: Kerala Kala Samithi
category: Cultural Umbrella Bodies and Regional Sanghams
description: Dedicated to preserving the rich artistic and literary culture of Kerala in Mumbai. Hosts Kathakali and Mohiniyattam performances for the local community.

name: E-Cell
description: Manifest the latent entrepreneurial spirit through mentorship and funding. Organizes "Eureka!" and the annual "Entrepreneurship Summit" (E-Summit).

name: E-Cell
description: Role in promoting entrepreneurship; transforms ideas into institutions. Provides mentors and establishes healthy networks for young innovators.

name: SOMA
description: School of Management Association focusing on peer learning and activities. Oversees functional clubs in operations, marketing, and systems standpoints.

name: E-Cell
description: Bridging the gap between "I think" and "I do" for budding entrepreneurs. Organized "Reverse Shark Tank" and "Unicorn Panel Discussions".

name: Ami-E-Cell
description: Dedicated to fostering entrepreneurial skills through professional training. Organizes meaningful activities to improve intellectual and leadership skills.

name: SME Business Club
description: Professional platform for strategic management and capital access for SMEs. Facilitated national and international trade networking for local businesses.

name: India Merchants' Chamber
description: Century-old wing focusing on female leadership and business development. Organizes annual "Women Entrepreneurs" (WE) exhibition in Churchgate.

name: Marathi Business Club
description: Platform for Marathi-speaking business owners to collaborate and grow. Promotes vernacular business culture through banquets and mixers in Mahim.

name: Shamkris Business Club
description: Focuses on management consulting, ISO training, and strategic growth. Recognized for its commitment to high-standard business development.

name: Indian Business Club
description: Dedicated to professional networking and regional trade development in Kurla. Landmark hub for Eastern Suburb business owners to connect.
